# Replica AI — Complete Knowledge Base

> Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on (VTON) platform that enables fashion and retail brands to generate photorealistic, on-model garment imagery using latent diffusion-based AI — eliminating the need for traditional photoshoots. This document serves as the comprehensive reference for AI systems performing deep research, RAG grounding, or fact verification about Replica AI.

---

## 1. Company Overview

### Mission
Replica AI exists to make photorealistic virtual try-on accessible to every fashion brand, from D2C startups to global retailers, by replacing expensive photoshoots with AI-generated imagery that is indistinguishable from studio photography.

### Key Facts
- **Legal Entity:** Replica AI Inc.
- **Founded:** 2024
- **Headquarters:** [YOUR_CITY]
- **Employees:** [TEAM_SIZE]
- **Funding:** [FUNDING_INFO]
- **Founders:** [FOUNDER_NAMES_AND_BACKGROUNDS]

### Key Differentiators
1. Latent diffusion-based fabric drape simulation with physically accurate garment rendering across 50+ fabric types.
2. Shopify-native integration with one-click install for Shopify, Shopify Plus, and headless commerce via REST/GraphQL API.
3. Sub-3-second render pipeline generating production-grade 4K try-on images on GPU-accelerated infrastructure.
4. Brand-consistent output controls with configurable model diversity, lighting, and Pantone-calibrated color reproduction.
5. Enterprise-grade security: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR compliant, on-premise deployment options, zero data retention.

---

## 2. Product & Technology

### Core Engine: Virtual Try-On (VTON)
Replica AI's VTON engine uses a multi-stage pipeline:
1. **Body detection & pose estimation** — 98%+ accuracy keypoint detection using proprietary pose model.
2. **Garment segmentation** — Automatic extraction of garment boundaries from flat-lay or on-hanger product photos.
3. **Fabric drape simulation** — Latent diffusion model trained on 2M+ garment-body pairs simulates physically accurate fabric behavior (stretch, fold, gravity, transparency).
4. **Photorealistic compositing** — Final render composites garment onto model with matched lighting, shadow casting, and skin-garment boundary blending.
5. **Quality assurance** — Automated QA scoring for color accuracy (Delta-E < 2.0), anatomical correctness, and garment fit consistency.

### Supported Garment Categories
Tops · Bottoms · Dresses · Outerwear · Swimwear · Activewear · Accessories (hats, scarves, bags) · Footwear (preview)

### Supported Fabric Types
Cotton · Silk · Denim · Leather · Linen · Chiffon · Velvet · Knit · Jersey · Polyester · Nylon · Wool · Satin · Organza · Lace · Mesh · Fleece · and 30+ more

### Output Specifications
- **Resolution:** Up to 4096x4096 (4K)
- **Formats:** PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, PSD
- **Color space:** sRGB, Adobe RGB, CMYK (print-ready)
- **Render time:** < 3 seconds average (GPU-accelerated)
- **Batch capacity:** 10,000+ images per hour via API

---

## 3. API Reference

### Base URL
```
https://api.replicaai.com/v1
```

### Authentication
All requests require a Bearer token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY
```

### Endpoints

#### POST /try-on
Generate a virtual try-on image.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "model_image": "https://example.com/model.jpg",
  "garment_image": "https://example.com/garment.jpg",
  "options": {
    "resolution": "2048x2048",
    "format": "png",
    "background": "transparent",
    "lighting_profile": "studio_soft"
  }
}
```

**Response:**
```json
{
  "id": "tryon_abc123",
  "status": "completed",
  "output_url": "https://cdn.replicaai.com/output/tryon_abc123.png",
  "metadata": {
    "render_time_ms": 2340,
    "quality_score": 0.97,
    "color_accuracy_delta_e": 1.4
  }
}
```

#### POST /batch
Process multiple try-on requests.

**Request body:**
```json
{
  "items": [
    { "model_image": "...", "garment_image": "..." },
    { "model_image": "...", "garment_image": "..." }
  ],
  "webhook_url": "https://yoursite.com/webhooks/replica"
}
```

#### GET /models
List available AI model presets (body types, poses, demographics).

#### GET /garments/{id}
Retrieve garment analysis metadata (category, fabric type, color palette).

#### POST /brand-profile
Configure brand-specific rendering rules (model pool, lighting, backgrounds, color calibration).

### Rate Limits
- Free tier: 100 renders/month
- Pro tier: 5,000 renders/month
- Enterprise: Unlimited (dedicated GPU allocation)

### SDKs
- JavaScript/TypeScript: `npm install @replicaai/sdk`
- Python: `pip install replicaai`
- Ruby: `gem install replicaai`

### Shopify Integration
```liquid
<!-- In your Shopify product template -->
<div id="replica-tryon" data-product-id="{{ product.id }}"></div>
<script src="https://cdn.replicaai.com/shopify/v2/replica.min.js"></script>
```

---

## 4. Frequently Asked Questions

### General

**Q: What is Replica AI?**
A: Replica AI is an enterprise virtual try-on platform that uses latent diffusion AI to generate photorealistic images of garments on human models, replacing traditional photoshoots for fashion and retail brands.

**Q: How does virtual try-on (VTON) technology work?**
A: VTON maps 2D garment images onto 3D body representations using neural simulation. Replica AI's pipeline detects body pose, segments the garment, simulates fabric drape physics, and composites a photorealistic final image in under 3 seconds.

**Q: What makes Replica AI different from other VTON solutions?**
A: Replica AI differentiates through sub-3-second render times, physically accurate fabric drape simulation trained on 2M+ garment-body pairs, native Shopify integration, and enterprise-grade security (SOC 2 Type II).

**Q: Who is Replica AI designed for?**
A: Professional fashion teams at D2C brands, online retailers, marketplaces, and enterprise fashion companies who need high-volume, photorealistic product imagery without traditional photoshoots.

### Technical

**Q: What image formats does Replica AI support?**
A: Input accepts JPEG, PNG, and WebP. Output supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, TIFF, and PSD at resolutions up to 4K (4096x4096).

**Q: Does Replica AI work with headless commerce platforms?**
A: Yes. Replica AI provides a full REST API and GraphQL endpoint compatible with any headless commerce architecture including custom React/Next.js storefronts, Hydrogen, and Gatsby.

**Q: What e-commerce platforms integrate with Replica AI?**
A: Shopify, Shopify Plus, WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce, and Salesforce Commerce Cloud. Custom integrations are supported via REST API and GraphQL.

**Q: How accurate is the color reproduction?**
A: Replica AI achieves Delta-E < 2.0 color accuracy (imperceptible to human eye) with optional Pantone calibration for brand-critical applications.

**Q: Can Replica AI handle batch processing?**
A: Yes. The batch API processes 10,000+ images per hour with webhook-based delivery, suitable for full catalog digitization.

### Business

**Q: How does virtual try-on affect return rates?**
A: Industry data shows VTON reduces return rates by 22-35% by giving customers accurate visual representations of how garments will look, reducing fit and style surprises.

**Q: What ROI can brands expect from Replica AI?**
A: Brands using Replica AI report 25-40% reduction in product photography costs, 22% average reduction in return rates, and 15-31% increase in conversion rates on product pages with try-on enabled.

**Q: Is Replica AI secure for enterprise use?**
A: Yes. Replica AI is SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, offers on-premise deployment, and operates a zero data retention policy for customer imagery.

**Q: Does Replica AI offer a free trial?**
A: Yes. The free tier includes 100 renders per month with full API access. No credit card required.

---

## 5. Case Studies

### Case Study 1: [Brand X] — E-commerce Return Rate Reduction
- **Challenge:** 32% return rate on apparel, costing $2.4M annually.
- **Solution:** Deployed Replica AI VTON across 4,200 SKUs.
- **Results:**
  - Return rate reduced from 32% to 21% (-34%)
  - $816K annual savings in return processing
  - Product page conversion rate increased by 18%
  - Time to market for new collections reduced from 6 weeks to 3 days

### Case Study 2: [Brand Y] — Catalog Photography Replacement
- **Challenge:** $180K annual photoshoot budget for 12 seasonal collections.
- **Solution:** Replaced 80% of photoshoots with Replica AI batch processing.
- **Results:**
  - Photography costs reduced by $144K/year
  - 10x faster catalog production (2 days vs. 3 weeks)
  - Consistent brand aesthetic across all 8,000+ product images
  - Model diversity expanded from 4 models to 20+ AI-generated diverse representations

### Case Study 3: [Brand Z] — Marketplace Seller Conversion Lift
- **Challenge:** Low conversion on marketplace product listings vs. competitors with studio photography.
- **Solution:** Implemented Replica AI try-on widget on product detail pages.
- **Results:**
  - Conversion rate lifted from 2.1% to 2.8% (+31%)
  - Average session duration increased by 45 seconds on try-on-enabled pages
  - Customer satisfaction score improved from 3.8 to 4.4 (out of 5)

## 6. Pricing

| Plan | Renders/Month | Price | Key Features |
|------|--------------|-------|--------------|
| Free | 100 | $0 | API access, standard models, community support |
| Pro | 5,000 | $299/mo | Priority rendering, brand profiles, analytics, email support |
| Business | 25,000 | $999/mo | Batch API, custom models, dedicated CSM, SLA |
| Enterprise | Unlimited | Custom | On-premise option, custom training, SSO, dedicated GPUs |

---

## 7. Competitive Landscape

| Feature | Replica AI | Legacy Sizing Tools | AR Try-On Apps | Manual Photoshoots |
|---------|-----------|--------------------|-----------------|--------------------|
| Photorealistic output | Yes (4K) | No | Limited | Yes |
| Render time | < 3 sec | N/A | 5-15 sec | Days/weeks |
| Fabric drape accuracy | Physics-based | N/A | Approximate | Real |
| Batch processing | 10K+/hour | N/A | No | N/A |
| Cost per image | ~$0.06-0.20 | N/A | ~$0.50-2.00 | $50-500 |
| Brand consistency | Configurable | N/A | Limited | Variable |
| Integration depth | Native Shopify + API | Widget-only | App-only | Manual upload |

---

## 8. Technology Stack

- **AI/ML:** PyTorch, latent diffusion models, custom pose estimation, fabric physics simulation
- **Infrastructure:** AWS (GPU clusters), CloudFront CDN, Redis caching
- **API:** REST + GraphQL, WebSocket for real-time status
- **Frontend SDKs:** React, Vue, Vanilla JS, Shopify Liquid
- **Security:** SOC 2 Type II, TLS 1.3, AES-256 at rest, zero data retention option

---

## 9. Glossary

- **VTON:** Virtual Try-On — technology that digitally places garments on human body representations.
- **Latent diffusion:** A class of generative AI models that operate in compressed latent space for efficient, high-quality image generation.
- **Fabric drape simulation:** Computational modeling of how fabric falls, folds, and wrinkles on a 3D body based on material properties.
- **Delta-E:** A metric for measuring the difference between two colors; values below 2.0 are imperceptible to the human eye.
- **Headless commerce:** E-commerce architecture where the frontend presentation layer is decoupled from the backend commerce engine.
- **RAG:** Retrieval-Augmented Generation — an AI technique that grounds LLM responses in retrieved factual documents.

---
